# Citadel Nexus Copilot/Codex Bridge

This repository is governed by the root AGENTS.md file.

Before any task:
1. Read AGENTS.md.
2. Follow all approval gates, forbidden actions, workflow rules, and completion standards.
3. Treat backend as source of truth.
4. Treat Discord as reflection only.
5. Treat frontend as surface only.
6. Do not read or edit .env.
7. Do not deploy, migrate, restart services, mutate Discord, touch wallets/tokens, or merge to main.
8. For docs-only tasks, edit only approved documentation paths.
9. If the task conflicts with AGENTS.md, stop and report the conflict.
10. Return exact check output when verification commands are run.
